# Connectors

> AI agents should consult [Docs for Agents](https://developer.pingidentity.com/build-with-ai/docs-for-agents.md)
> for guidance on navigating Ping Identity documentation.

## Connectors

- [Accertify Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/accertify_connector.md)
- [Adobe Experience Manager Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/adobe_experience_manager_connector.md)
- [Apple Login Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/apple_login_connector.md): The Apple Login connector authenticates users with Sign in with Apple and retrieves Apple ID attributes for use in DaVinci flows.
- [April 2023](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2023-04-April.md)
- [April 2024](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2024-04-April.md)
- [April 2025](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2025-04-April.md)
- [April 2026](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/2026-04-April.md)
- [August 2023](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2023-08-August.md)
- [August 2025](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/2025-08-August.md)
- [Authentication Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/authentication_connector.md): The Authentication connector lets you quickly orchestrate flows in PingOne DaVinci for common authentication use cases.
- [AuthenticID Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/authenticid_connector.md)
- [Azure AD User Management Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/azure_ad_user_management_connector.md)
- [Babel Street Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/babelstreet_connector.md)
- [Castle Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/castle_connector.md)
- [Challenge Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/challenge_connector.md)
- [CLEAR Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/clear_connector.md)
- [Cloudflare Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/cloudflare_connector.md)
- [Code Snippet Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/code_snippet_connector.md)
- [Constella Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/constella_connector.md)
- [Cookie Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/cookie_connector.md)
- [Core connectors](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/type/core_connectors.md)
- [CrowdStrike Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/crowdstrike_connector.md)
- [Daon Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/daon_connector.md)
- [December 2022](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2022-12-December.md)
- [December 2024](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2024-12-December.md)
- [Device Policy Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/device_policy_connector.md)
- [Duo Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/duo_connector.md)
- [Entrust Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/entrust_connector.md)
- [Error Message Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/error_message_connector.md)
- [Facebook Login Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/facebook_login_connector.md): The Facebook Login connector authenticates users with Facebook and retrieves user attributes for use in DaVinci flows.
- [February 2022](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2022-02-February.md)
- [February 2024](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2024-02-February.md)
- [February 2025](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2025-02-February.md)
- [February 2026](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/2026-02-February.md)
- [FingerprintJS Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/fingerprintjs_connector.md)
- [Flow Analytics Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/flow_analytics_connector.md)
- [Flow Conductor Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/flow_conductor_connector.md)
- [Form Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/form_connector.md)
- [Functions Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/functions_connector.md)
- [Google Login Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/google_login_connector.md): The Google Login connector authenticates users with Google and retrieves user attributes for use in DaVinci flows.
- [Google Workspace Admin Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/google_workspace_admin_connector.md)
- [HTTP Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/http_connector.md)
- [HYPR Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/hypr_connector.md)
- [ID DataWeb Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/id_dataweb_connector.md)
- [Island Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/island_connector.md)
- [January 2023](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2023-01-January.md)

- [LexisNexis Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/lexisnexis_connector.md)
- [Location Policy Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/location_policy_connector.md)

- [May 2026](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/2026-05-May.md)
- [MFA Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/mfa_connector.md): The MFA connector provides a fast way to orchestrate flows in PingOne DaVinci for common multi-factor authentication (MFA) use cases.
- [Microsoft Defender for Endpoint Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/microsoft_defender_connector.md)
- [Microsoft Edge for Business Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/microsoft_edge_connector.md)
- [Microsoft Teams Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/microsoft_teams_connector.md)

- [October 2024](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/archive/2024-10-October.md)
- [October 2025](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/relnotes/2025-10-October.md)
- [OIDC and OAuth IdP Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/oidc_oauth_idp_connector.md)
- [OneTrust Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/onetrust_connector.md)
- [Ping connectors](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/type/ping_connectors.md)
- [PingFederate Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/pf_connector.md)
- [PingID Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/pid_connector.md)
- [PingID Legacy Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/pid_legacy_connector.md)
- [PingOne Advanced Identity Cloud Access Request Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_advanced_identity_cloud_access_request_connector.md)
- [PingOne Advanced Identity Cloud Login Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_advanced_identity_cloud_login_connector.md)
- [PingOne Authentication Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_authentication_connector.md): The PingOne Authentication connector lets you authenticate users and manage PingOne user authentication sessions in your PingOne DaVinci flow.
- [PingOne Authorize Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1az_connector.md)
- [PingOne Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_connector.md): Use the PingOne DaVinci connector to add PingOne functionality for your DaVinci flow.
- [PingOne Credentials Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_credentials_connector.md)
- [PingOne DaVinci Connectors](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/index.md)
- [PingOne MFA Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_mfa_connector.md)
- [PingOne Notifications Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_notifications_connector.md)
- [PingOne Protect Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_protect_connector.md)
- [PingOne RADIUS Gateway Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_radius_gateway_connector.md)
- [PingOne Scope Consent Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_scope_consent_connector.md)
- [PingOne Verify Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/p1_verify_connector.md): Use the PingOne Verify DaVinci connector to securely verify a user's identity.
- [Protect Use Case Connector](https://docs.pingidentity.com/connectors/protect_use_case_connector.md)
